hero_flight_2: A blonde woman in a black leather jacket with a red logo leans on the open door of a black vintage car. The scene transforms into a first-person aerial view above city rooftops, an arm in a black leather sleeve stretched out over the street below.
hero_flight_6: A man in a green sweater and pink beanie stands outside a Parisian café holding a shopping bag and a pink jacket. The scene transforms into a first-person aerial view above a narrow European street, a green-sleeved arm stretched out ahead.
super_fast_run_2: A woman in a dark athletic outfit leans forward under a sculpted concrete ceiling. The scene transforms into the woman sprinting toward the camera mid-stride, the corridor behind her streaked with motion blur.
super_fast_run_10: A man in sunglasses, a dark green hoodie and white cap stands in a bright industrial kitchen. The scene transforms into the man running toward the camera down the corridor, the room behind him smeared into streaks.
plasma_explosion_0: A young man sits on a sticker-covered box at a busy Japanese crossing. The scene transforms into an aerial view of the intersection covered by a huge burst of white smoke, cars and crowds blurring below.
plasma_explosion_4: A man stands beside a blue sports car in front of a neon-lit Japanese storefront at night. The scene transforms into the night street covered by an enormous white smoke burst above the asphalt.
shadow_10: A smiling woman in a leather jacket, white top and light jeans sits against an iron fence. The scene transforms into the woman shrouded in a mass of black feathery darkness, only her face and white top still visible.
shadow_2: A woman with a colorful headscarf stands in a dry grass field at dusk, hands in pockets. The scene transforms into the woman engulfed in dark billowing black matter, her scarf and midriff still showing.
fire_element_0: A man in a black varsity jacket stands in a flowering field at dusk. The scene transforms into a close view of the man glowing from within, his skin and jacket cracked with molten orange veins.
fire_element_4: A woman in a dark outfit stands in a burning field, flames rising behind her. The scene transforms into the woman turned into a glowing ember figure laced with molten cracks, walking through the burning grass.
wireframe_5: A woman in a dark bomber jacket stands in a parking lot at dusk, hands in pockets. The scene transforms into the woman rendered as a glowing teal grid figure on a black background.
wireframe_7: A green serum bottle sits among cacti on rocks. The scene transforms into the bottle and cacti drawn as a glowing green mesh of lines on a black background.
illustration_scene_4: A blonde woman with sunglasses and a headscarf blows a kiss with both hands at her cheeks. The scene transforms into the same portrait drawn as a flat comic illustration in yellow and black.
illustration_scene_7: A young man in a leather jacket and denim shorts leans against a railing by a stone wall. The scene transforms into the same pose drawn as a comic panel in orange and cyan.
animalization_0: A woman in a red bomber jacket poses against a blue studio backdrop, hands on hips. The scene transforms into a shaggy brown dog standing on the same blue backdrop.
animalization_3: A young man in a bucket hat and red t-shirt stands in front of a corner coffee house. The scene transforms into a red fox trotting away down the same sidewalk.
gas_transformation_2: A woman with long dark hair in a beige trench coat stands beside a marble café table. The scene transforms into the empty café terrace, chairs and coffee cups left behind.
gas_transformation_7: A man in a cowboy hat, red jacket and cream trousers leans against a brown corrugated wall. The scene transforms into the empty corrugated wall with a faint haze drifting at the top.
portal_11: A blonde woman in a black graphic sweater stands in an underground parking garage. The scene transforms into the empty garage with a small glowing green swirl hovering between the cars.
portal_12: A woman with long braids browses crates of records in a cluttered record store. The scene transforms into the record store without her, a small green glow fading by the far shelves.
giant_grab_1: A man in a green jacket and purple shorts stands on an indoor basketball court under a hoop. The scene transforms into the empty court with a huge hand making a peace sign in front of the hoop.
giant_grab_4: A woman in a long yellow dress stands on a lawn in front of a sunflower field. The scene transforms into the sunflower field with a giant hand making a peace sign above the hedge.
money_rain_2: A man in sunglasses and a dark green work shirt stands in a wood-paneled room, hands in pockets. The scene transforms into the same room with banknotes fluttering in the air around him.
hole_transition_0: A man in a black suit crouches against a red graffiti-covered door, staring ahead. The scene transforms into a woman in a white top holding a small black case up to the camera under neon bar lights.
